programme.desc: Helen knits a pair of magical socks for Principal Secretary so he can beat a rival school's principal in a dance battle, but this newfound talent quickly goes to his head.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Kiff loses a hat that gave Barry a confidence boost and attempts to recover it; Kiff and Barry try to return a lost journal without exposing its deeply personal entries.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey pretends to run a taxi service, where her first passenger is Businessman Dad, who urgently needs to get to the airport.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bingo is the model citizen...commuting to work on the Dad-Train, dropping her daughter at day care and working as a vet; Bluey on the other hand is much more intent on having fun.

programme.title: The ZhuZhus
programme.desc: Frankie and the Zhus each tell a very different story when asked about a broken lamp.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: An amateur Blader joins forces with a former champion to create a new team with their sights set on claiming the top spot.

programme.title: Beyblade X
programme.desc: Team Phalanx is hanging on to their sponsorship by a thread, with their upcoming match with Team Persona their last chance to stay in the limelight.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
programme.desc: On her first day of school, Billie uses magic to impress Roman's best friend; when a jealous Roman steals Billie's wand, he falls into the grasp of a wizard-hunting phantomus.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie and Justin work together to undo a spell when Billie's prank goes awry; Roman gets new muscles thanks to a magical muscle tee; Milo's class pet is loose in the house.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: When Parents Day sneaks up on Vee and Elijah, they struggle to keep their parents from meeting; Demi learns how to disguise his ghostly form.

programme.title: Electric Bloom
programme.desc: Posey, Jade, and Tulip's pact to not let a boy come between them is tested when it comes to finding dates for the school dance.

programme.title: Love Story The Series S3
programme.desc: Kendra's meeting with Maudy began with an accidental meeting at the Villa, that's where Ken first saw Maudy and immediately fell in love. Initially, Maudy was disturbed by Ken's presence, accidentally the horse that Maudy was riding went berserk until it fell into the river, not long after Ken jumped to save Maudy.

programme.title: Otw Pelaminan, Gas Gak Pake Rem
programme.desc: Once a former lover, Alana eventually got close to Niko again. In order to seek forgiveness from Niko, Alana agreed to be a matchmaker to bring Niko closer to a woman named Tiar. However, secretly, Alana fell in love with Niko again, and without realizing it, Niko also still loved Alana.

programme.title: Cinta Kadang Gulali Ke Bawah Kadang Gulali Keatas
programme.desc: Ruby has to take her mother's place selling cotton candy in front of the school. While serving a little girl, Ruby is accused by Angkasa of being part of a child kidnapping syndicate. Ruby refuses to be accused in such a way and defends herself. What happens next?

programme.title: Trio Gabut Kursus Iman (Spesial Ramadan)
programme.desc: The story begins with three young men, Billy, Ge, and Qausar, who are wanted by the police for allegedly practicing illegal circumcision. Not only that, they are also accused of kidnapping the child of a gangster boss named Selfi, played by Syahnaz. To protect themselves from capture and these accusations, they try to escape and become temporary students at a boarding school. This leads them to me

programme.title: Dia Yang Kau Pilih
programme.desc: Kinara, a kind-hearted girl who is the backbone of her family. Maura, Kinara's younger sister, never wants to help and has ambitions to marry a rich man so she can live a luxurious life. Kinara gets a job at Dafa's company. Working together often causes Dafa and Kirana to fall in love. Knowing this, Maura wants to steal Dafa away.

programme.title: Ketika Level Tertinggi Cinta Adalah Soto Ayam
programme.desc: The story of a reckless guy named Raga who struggles to graduate from college because he has become a perpetual student. Raga has to meet a girl named Alin who sells soto and also attends the same college as him.

programme.title: Kuwa Kuwi Dia Mainnya Cantik dan Elegan
programme.desc: After accidentally hitting Wisnu's mother, Kirana hid the incident so she wouldn't be blamed. The encounter brought the two closer together. However, unexpectedly, Wisnu eventually found out that it was Kirana who had hit his mother.

programme.title: Ganteng Ganteng Bau Domba, Tapi Aku Suka
programme.desc: Yosi was heartbroken when she found out that her brother-in-law was the guy she had been crushing on since high school and that she had to marry her own brother. But everything changed when Ryan, a local sheep farmer, came along and healed her broken heart. Ryan had fallen in love with Yosi.

programme.title: Cinta Setelah Cinta S1
programme.desc: Love After Love tells the story of a family that appears perfect but hides a heartbreaking secret. Feeling lucky to have a husband like Niko, a successful businessman, and a daughter, Audrey, Starla must now swallow the bitterness of Niko's affair with their mutual school friend, Ayu.

programme.title: Belum Mantan Masih Demen
programme.desc: Maya (Shanice Margaretha) feels abandoned by Sigit (Kiki Farrel), the man she likes, because Sigit often uploads videos with a beautiful girl. Maya is determined to change her appearance and behavior.

programme.title: Braven
programme.desc: A logger and his father head to their hunting cabin, hoping for a quiet weekend. Instead, they find themselves in a kill-or-be-killed stand for survival when they encounter a gang of drug traffickers.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Rocky Balboa fights champion Mason Dixon in a surprise return. His unexpected comeback inspires many, defying age and odds.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ethan Hunt, an elite intelligence agent, is branded a traitor following a disastrous mission in Prague. He recruits a team of operatives to help him retrieve a computer disk that can clear his name.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: A crew that reaches Skull Island to map it, is attacked by a humongous ape. The survivors then regroup to find out more about the ape, the island's natives and underground monsters.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: When Sam Witwicky buys a car, he unwittingly involves himself in a clash between Autobots and Decepticons over a device that can create life.

programme.title: G.I. Joe: Retaliation
programme.desc: The GI Joes are declared traitors by Zartan, with Cobra Commander now having all the world leaders under his control. With nowhere to go, the team turns to its original leader, General Colton.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Red, Chuck and Bomb have always been the outcasts within a community of flightless birds on an island. But when mysterious green pigs intrude the island, it is up to them to figure out the reason.

programme.desc: It's Buffalo's busiest winter yet, and they roll out the C-46, TXW, to fly all the freight up the Mackenzie Valley. They look to their newly purchased Electra, XFC, to fill the void, but Adam, Chuck, Brian and Mikey discover it has a cracked windshield and cannot be flown safely.

programme.desc: The Puerto Rico Open is the only PGA Tour tournament on the island and the first in the Caribbean. It was first played in 2008. The tournament is played at the Coco Beach Golf Course. As an alternate event, the winner does not earn a bid to the Masters, but still receives a two-year exemption on the PGA Tour and entry into the PGA Championship as a Tour winner.
